texto: Maybe we’ll evolve to a point where fear as an experience is no longer instinctual, but rather an emotion we use to enrich our understanding of why our human ancestors killed each other when they could have loved each other. One day we’ll be holding hands instead of grudges; we’ll eliminate our territorial circuits and know what love is. One day we’ll be holding hands instead of M-16s.
explicacao: Citação de Oliver Hart sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Maybe we’ll evolve to a point where fear as an experience is no longer instinctual, but rather an…” articula amor, love, war em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como war.
